titleStmt.title: SII 41.96: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 96. (A.R. No. 95 of 1905.) Mēlkiḍāram, Mudukulattur Taluk, Ramnad District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the deserted Isvara temple at Mēlkiḍāram.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya. Māṟavarman Sundara-pāṇḍya II, Year 4+2 = 1244 A.D.

summary.p: Built in. Records that the king made tax-free on the dēvadāna village of Cheḻuvaṉūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūmalar tiruvum poruḷ jayamaṭantayun tāmaraikku vimulai[ja]
yappuyattiruppa vetanāvil veḷḷitaṭ tāmaraik kātalmātu kaviṉ peṟat tilaippa veṇṭiraiyuṭuttu ma
ṇṭiṇi kiṭakkait tirunilamaṭantaiyurimayiṟṟilaippac camayamu nitiyun tarumamun taḻai
ppa Imaiyavar viḻākkoṭiyiṭantoṟu meṭuppak karuṅkalakaṉal keṭak kaṭavuḷ vetiyar A
runtoḻil veḻvic ceṅkaṉal vaḷara curutiyun tamiḻuñ colvaṉaṅ
kulava porutiṟalāḻi pūtalañcūḻvara Orukai yirucevi mummata nāṟkoṭṭa yirāpata mutal
ceyatira koṟṟat teṇṭicai yāṉai Eruttameṟik kaṇṭanāṭu memateṉa kayalkaḷikūrak ko
calan tuḷuvaṅ kūkiraṅ kuccaram pocala makatam poppaḷam puṇṭaraṅ kaliṅkaṭāraṅ gauṭadeliṅgam ji
na jonagam mutalāya vitimuṟai tikaḻa vevveṟuvakutta muta nilakkiḻamai yiṉ muṭipuṉai ventaṟ
kkorutaṉināyakaṉeṉṟula kettak koṟṟat tāḷak kuḷir kuṭai niḻaṟṟak kaṟṟaik kava
ri kāvalar ṉattuṭaṉ paṅkayamalark karaṅ kuvittup pāttivar maṅkaiyar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅk
ku ceṉṉi Iṭaicevaṭic civanta Iṇai malarcciṟaṭik kaṉakam tu
meṉṟaṇuku mulaka muḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmutal matik
kiya komutal komāṟa panmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīsundarapā
vaṟku yāṇṭu 4itiṉ Etir 2vatu prasātañcetaruḷiya tirumukappaṭi tribhuvaṉa
ṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ Iṭaikkuḷa nāṭṭuc ceḻuvaṉūrāṉa catturupayaṅkara
liśvaramuṭaiyār koyil śivabrāhmaṇaṟkum tevarkaṉmikkum kiṭāraṅke
ttiruvaṉa[ ntiśvara] muṭaiyar koyil śivabrāhmaṇaṟkum devarkaṉmika
kaḷukkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukkut tāṅkaḷ
nāṭṭu Āppaṉūrkkā kalakka mai tevatāṉamākac caṇdheśvaranāmattāl vilai koṇṭa
varukiṟa tetaṉ kuḷam vilaiyōlai ppaṭi nāṉke
ṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñcey puṉceyum nattamu
mum Uṭ ppaṭṭa nam nālāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭiṉetirā
talakaṭa maiyum Antarāyamum taruvatāna Accum kāriyavārācciyum
Digital edition of SII 41.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
